markdown:
#  Configure Columns for the Project Status Snapshots Tab of the Budget Tool 
##  Background 
Users can customize the column display for the Project Status Snapshots tab of the Budget tool. This lets your team focus on what's relevant to your unique business needs.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the Project level Budget tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Budget** tool.
  2. Click the **Project Status Snapshots** tab.
  3. Click **Configure Columns**.  
This opens the **Table Settings** panel.   
![Pss Configure Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1cd7f209e8b4d1b4d2cc2ee27af78ed1/f78fd261b6f5f4c63465a4cdda7078be/pss-configure-columns.png?fm=webp&h=241)
  4. Under **Configure Columns** , you have these choices for each available column:
     * **Show** columns. Move the toggle switch to the right. The system's default setting is to show all available columns.
     * **Hide** columns. Move the toggle switch to the left.
  5. When finished, click the **Close** (x) icon on the panel.


## See Also
  * [Export a Snapshot List from the Project Status Snapshots Tab in the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/export-a-snapshot-list-from-the-project-status-snapshots-tab-in-the-budget-tool)
  * [View a Snapshot from the Budget Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/view-a-snapshot-from-the-budget-tool)
  * [About the Project Status Snapshots Tab](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/about-the-project-status-snapshots-tab)

description: How to configure columns for the Project Status Snapshots tab in the Project level Budget tool.
